description_long: This is a rectangular mattress with a soft, quilted white cover and a visible blue and turquoise bedsheet partially wrapped around it. The mattress appears to be of standard thickness, with rounded corners and a slightly textured surface. The white top layer has a subtle wavy pattern, suggesting a plush or padded finish. The blue bedsheet is tucked in at the sides and foot, with a gradient of blue shades and a clean, modern look. The mattress is likely constructed with a foam or spring core, covered by fabric and padding for comfort. There are no visible brand markings, stains, or tags, and the edges are finished with a simple seam rather than prominent piping.
description: A soft, white mattress with a blue bedsheet partially wrapped around it, featuring a subtle wavy texture and clean, rounded edges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white quilted top and the blue bedsheet tucked at the foot of the mattress.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the mattress and the blue bedsheet wrapping around the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the blue bedsheet more prominently at the head and foot, with the white top surface visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the blue bedsheet and the continuous white quilted surface.
attribute_pattern_design: Subtle wavy quilted pattern on the white cover; blue bedsheet with a gradient design.
attribute_edge_piping: Simple seam with no prominent edge piping; the border is minimally finished and matches the white cover.
